---

Okay, another mistake you could be making is you're assuming that lead is the decision-maker and they're not. This is very, very tricky. It's important to view an internet lead as far more than one person listed on the lead. All you know right now is I have somebody doing something for somebody, something somewhere in their environment is interest in your product or your service. An internet lead could very well be a gateway into a bigger opportunity. Maybe they were given directions to go find something. How often does your company do that? Hey, go find this or that on the internet. Find out where we can get it. Shop three companies. Get me prices. And this person is only looking at was given one project when maybe there's three, four, or five projects. So you need to find that out. Look for who is the decision-maker. Who's the influencers? Are there any influencers behind the main decision-makers? Did you know that companies that have 100 to 500 employees have up to seven decision-makers? Seven people involved in making a decision for companies that have 100 to 500 employees. So there could be levels of decision-makers. Don't assume that the person essential lead is the buyer. For instance, recently I bought my wife a product on the internet. She was the decision-maker. I was the one doing the work. She gave me the task, but ultimately I'm giving her the information. So I'm having to kind of go through all this information and give her a piece. When she got in communication with the people, it went in a completely different direction. She bought a completely different product than the one that I had done all the work on. I felt like I wasted all my time, but the truth is I didn't. I produced the lead. I showed interest. I became a particle to deal with. And the salesperson, the company, did a great job at finding out it was her and then asked for permission to contact her directly. Always work on getting to know who else will influence this decision. Who else might influence this purchase? Who could change the direction of this or influence it in some way? And by the way, when they say I'm the decision-maker, I wouldn't even trust them then. I would ask for and try to find out is there anybody else that might influence this decision other than yourself that I could also add to this email string.
